text: Viktor Orbán concedes defeat as Hungary's Tisza Party heads for election win - NBC News
fullText: Peter Magyar's center-right Tisza party is projected to win Hungary's parliamentary election, bringing an end to 16 years of authoritarian rule under Viktor Orbán, a far-right ally of both President Donald Trump and Russian President Vladimir Putin.

text: Trump says U.S. will blockade Strait of Hormuz and intercept ships that paid tolls to Iran - CBS News
fullText: President Trump said the U.S. Navy will begin blockading ships from entering or exiting the Strait of Hormuz and intercept vessels that have paid tolls to Iran.

text: Sources: Louisville lands top portal entries Bidunga, Shelstad - ESPN
fullText: Louisville received commitments from former Kansas big-man Flory Bidunga and former Oregon guard Jackson Shelstad, sources told ESPN on Sunday.

text: 1 dead, 6 hurt in Chick-fil-A shooting in Union Township, N.J., investigators say - CBS New York - CBS News
